intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant 'Angostura cuspare'. However, I found information on Angostura bark (Angostura trifoliata), a plant native to Venezuela and the Caribbean. 

Angostura bark is a plant-based remedy that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. It has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Angostura bark include tannins, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Angostura bark is commonly used to make a bitter herbal tonic, known as Angostura bitters, which is used to aid digestion, relieve indigestion and heartburn, and as a hangover remedy.
